ast.name: appendText
ast.source: Actions URI is brought to you by

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: , a macOS/iOS app made by the same developer as this plugin. AFO is the missing link between Obsidian and macOS / iOS: 50+ Shortcuts actions to bring your notes and your automations together.
ast.target: 提供支持，这是一款由本插件同一开发者制作的 macOS/iOS 应用。AFO 是 Obsidian 与 macOS / iOS 之间缺失的桥梁：提供 50 多个快捷指令操作，将您的笔记与自动化流程连接起来。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Actions URI is able to find notes by their UID.
        This unique identifier is stored in the note's frontmatter.
        The plugin needs to know under which frontmatter key it can find the UID. (Default: "uid".)
ast.target:
Actions URI 能够通过笔记的 UID 查找笔记。
        此唯一标识符存储在笔记的 frontmatter 中。
        插件需要知道在哪个 frontmatter 键下可以找到 UID。（默认值：“uid”。）

ast.name: message
ast.source: Input must be a JSON-encoded string array.
ast.target: 输入必须是 JSON 编码的字符串数组。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Input must be a JSON-encoded object containing only values of type string, string array, number, boolean or null.
ast.target: 输入必须是 JSON 编码的对象，且仅包含字符串、字符串数组、数字、布尔值或 null 类型的值。
